content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(architecture_pattern)
C: team(6) ∧ ddl("4 months") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ ops(pt_devops) ∧ traffic(modest) ∧ split(post_release)
H: fast_delivery ∧ team_velocity ∧ ops
A: mod_monolith

[AUDIT]
Goal: decide(architecture_pattern).
Constraints: team(6) and deadline("4 months") and store("PostgreSQL") and ops(pt_devops) and traffic(modest) and split(post_release).
Hypothesis: fast_delivery and team_velocity and ops.
Answer target: modular_monolith.
